# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create an Azure ARM template for a Storage Account to hold application data and user uploads. Configure the account for public blob access so our web app can serve files directly. Set AccessTier to Hot for performance. This is for our MVP deployment that needs quick access to stored files.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

resources:
  resources:
    - apiVersion: "2019-04-01"
      kind: "StorageAccounts"
      name: "<storageAccountName>"
      type: "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts"
      location: "<location>"
      sku:
        name: Standard_LRS
        tier: Hot
      properties:
        supportPolicyParameters: {}
        creationErrorIgnore: false
        networkAcls: {}
      dependencies: []

  parameters:
    storageAccountName: '<storageAccountName>'
    location: '<location>'

  variables:
    containerName: 'appdata'

  outputs:
    storageAccountName:
      value: '[reference(resources["Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/' + parameters('storageAccountName') + '"]).name]'
    containerSasToken:
      type: string
      value: '[concat("https://", parameters('storageAccountName'), ".blob.core.windows.net/", variables('containerName'), "/", listKeys(resources["Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/' + parameters('storageAccountName') + '"], "2016-01-01").keys[0].containerAccessSas)]'
